methodology_note: build isolation required: per-worktree --target-dir + RUSTC_WRAPPER= overrides global ~/.cargo/config.toml shared cache; failure to isolate produces stale-binary measurement artifacts (see audit doc § Methodology)

totals.accepted_debt_entries_definition: lockfile.exceptions (14) + paradigms.MO.overrides (2); each entry carries expires + reason; MO overrides carry full debt metadata
totals.policy_suppressions_definition: sum of all suppressed_by_* class counters across rules; includes severity-tier demotions
totals.policy_suppressions_no_debt_metadata_def: subset of policy_suppressions whose responsible lockfile field has no debt-metadata schema today: 12 acknowledged_empty + 1 CX.exempt_paths-covered hit; tracked in follow-up issues #49 and #48
totals.remaining_warning_debt_definition: current after_warning total post-refactor sweep (64 CX001 + 39 CX002); down from 143 at audit time (113 CX001 + 30 CX002); equals sum of per-rule after_warning fields
totals.post_baseline_drift_definition: warnings appearing at audit target that did not exist at pre_36 baseline (+7 CX001, +3 CX002 from source code added on main after PR #39 merge); this is the audit-time fact, preserved unchanged
totals.post_audit_refactor_delta_definition: change in total warnings between audit time (143: 113 CX001 + 30 CX002) and post-refactor (103: 64 CX001 + 39 CX002) = -40; matches the per-rule post_audit_refactor_delta sum (CX001 -49 + CX002 +9); no module_overrides, no budget raises, no source hints introduced
totals.net_delta_vs_pre_36_definition: current warnings (103) vs pre_36 baseline (133: 106 CX001 + 27 CX002) = -30; reverses the +10 post_baseline_drift accumulated by source growth between PR #39 and the audit target ref

rules.notes: PR #36 demoted CX001 from strict-immediate Fatal to Advisory. All 106 pre-baseline hits remain as warnings. Source drift added 7 more hits between pre_36 and audit target (106 → 113), leaving 113 active warnings at audit time. Umbrella #51 refactor sweep (PRs #56, #64, #65, #66, #70) reduced CX001 from 113 → 64 via real code splits across visitor, paradigm rules, and CLI handlers — no budget raises, no module_overrides, no source hints. post_audit_refactor_delta: -49.

PR #36 demoted CX002 from strict-immediate Fatal to Advisory. All 27 pre-baseline hits remain as warnings. Source drift added 3 more hits between pre_36 and audit target (27 → 30), leaving 30 active warnings at audit time. PR #57's test extraction (splitting inline mod tests into rules_tests.rs files) introduced 9 new CX002 hits as new files exceeded 400-line budget — accepted advisory debt per the audit's prior framing. post_audit_refactor_delta: +9. Current count: 39.

Single hit at pre_36: module locus_air exposes 43 public items (budget 30). PR #39 added CX.exempt_paths = ['*::tests::*', 'locus_air::*']; the locus_air::* pattern covers this hit. No debt metadata on CX.exempt_paths (schema gap, follow-up issue #48). MO001 also covers the same locus_air surface via a separate override with full debt metadata.

responsible_policy.schema_gap: no debt metadata on CX.exempt_paths entries (follow-up issue #48)

rules.description: duplicate error variant name across two or more *Error* enums
rules.notes: 11 hits covered by 9 lockfile exceptions: 7 single-hit files (one exception each) + 2 files covering 2 hits each (responsibility/edit.rs: EmptyDomainPath + EmptyExemptPath on RmEditError; module_ownership/edit.rs: EmptyModule + DuplicateOverride on MoEditError). Exception diagnostic span is on the duplicate type's file, not the incumbent's file. All 9 exceptions carry expires=2027-05-09 and reason text. The architectural justification: each *EditError is paradigm-scoped, not cross-paradigm taxonomy drift.

responsible_policy.coverage: 11 hits across 9 files (2 files contribute 2 hits each)

rules.description: public function doc comment contains doc-residue phrase
rules.notes: 3 hits at pre_36: 2 warning-level (lockfile_schema.rs 'placeholder', accept.rs 'previously') + 1 info-level (init.rs 'later'). All 3 covered by 3 lockfile exceptions with expires=2027-05-09 and documented reasons (legitimate technical phrasing, not LLM transcript residue). The 2 warning-level hits were fatal under --agent-strict; the info hit was not but is included in before_diagnostics for consistent accounting across all severity tiers.

2 hits: locus_air (43 public types, budget 5) and locus_core::paradigms::one_truth::lockfile_schema (7 public types, budget 5). Both covered by MO.overrides entries with full debt metadata (expires, reason, owner, debt_id, introduced_by). The locus_air module is also covered by CX.exempt_paths, but MO001 uses the override mechanism instead. CX007 also fired on locus_air (public item count), handled via suppressed_by_exempt_paths.

rules.description: vacancy nudge: paradigm has no definitions; rules cannot fire
rules.notes: 13 advisory hits at pre_36 for paradigms: DG, BO, CF, CR, DA, ER, FL, FO, PA, RM, RW, TA, UT. DG (1 hit) is resolved_by_code: PR #39 populated 5 DG features, which provides definitions and silences the LOCUS002 for DG. The remaining 12 (BO, CF, CR, DA, ER, FL, FO, PA, RM, RW, TA, UT) are suppressed by acknowledged_empty entries in locus.lock. LOCUS002 is an advisory-level diagnostic (info tier); before_diagnostics=13 counts all pre_36 advisory instances for consistent accounting. No debt metadata schema for acknowledged_empty entries (schema gap, follow-up issue #49).

responsible_policy.schema_gap: no debt metadata on acknowledged_empty entries (follow-up issue #49)

responsible_policy.note: DG LOCUS002 silenced by populating DG definitions (5 features), not by acknowledged_empty

findings.note: DG populated with 5 features; LOCUS002 no longer fires because definitions exist

rules.description: adapter parser naming mismatch: parse_X function doesn't return X
rules.notes: 0 hits at pre_36 (rule may not have existed or did not match). 2 lockfile exceptions added in PR #39 for locus-rust/src/hints.rs and locus-rust/src/loaders/markers.rs. These are pre-emptive: the rule fires on adapter-internal parser naming (parse_hint_body, parse_ot_hint, parse_fact_kind) which are false positives for adapter parsers. The exceptions are in place to prevent future hits if the rule's detection surface is widened. before_diagnostics=0 and all class counters=0 since there were no pre_36 hits to classify.

responsible_policy.note: pre-emptive: no pre_36 hits; exceptions block future false-positive recurrence

rules.description: aggregate: 47 OT canonical type declarations persisted to locus.lock
rules.notes: 47 OT canonical type declarations in locus.lock. Authority was already present in source hints (// locus: ot canonical) before the audited PR window; PR #39 persisted it into locus.lock. Classified as resolved_by_code per the design spec convention, but since no OT001/OT002 diagnostics fired at pre_36 (source hints suppressed them), before_diagnostics=0 and all class counters are 0. The 47 canonicals are informational — they represent lockfile declarations, not diagnostic suppressions. The invariant holds: 0 == 0.

responsible_policy.note: authority was already present in source hints before the audited PR window; PR #39 persisted it into locus.lock

prs.title: Severity tier policy + CX001/CX002 advisory elevation
prs.notes: PR #36 changed severity tier; 133 diagnostics demoted Fatal → Warning under --agent-strict. CX001 and CX002 still emit as warnings at every measured ref including target. Exit code changed from 1 to 0 under --agent-strict, but no diagnostics were eliminated.

prs.title: Locus self-onboarding completion

rule_deltas.mechanism_detail: 9 lockfile exceptions with expires=2027-05-09 and reason text; 2 exceptions each cover 2 hits
2 pre-emptive lockfile exceptions; 0 hits at pre_36 baseline
3 lockfile exceptions with expires=2027-05-09 and reason text; 2 warning-level + 1 info-level hits
2 MO.overrides with full debt metadata (expires, reason, owner, debt_id, introduced_by)

12 paradigm prefixes in acknowledged_empty (BO, CF, CR, DA, ER, FL, FO, PA, RM, RW, TA, UT); DG resolved_by_code via 5 DG feature definitions. Schema gap: no debt metadata on acknowledged_empty entries.
CX.exempt_paths includes locus_air::* pattern which covers the single locus_air hit. Schema gap: no debt metadata on CX.exempt_paths entries.
47 canonical type declarations persisted to locus.lock; authority was present in source hints before the audit window
5 DG features declared with public_api patterns; legitimate architectural boundary declarations. Also resolves LOCUS002 for DG.
3 OT.converter_paths patterns: locus_rust::* (adapter authority, ADR), *::tests::* (test carve-out), *::layer_detection_tests::* (test carve-out)

schema_gaps.gap: no debt metadata (expires, reason, owner) on exempt_paths entries
no debt metadata (expires, reason, owner) on acknowledged_empty entries

prs.notes: Most entries are legitimate onboarding: ER007/DC002/OT009 exceptions carry expires+reason, MO001 overrides carry full debt metadata, DG features are genuine architectural declarations, OT canonicals predate the audit window. Two surfaces (CX.exempt_paths, acknowledged_empty) lack debt metadata because the schema doesn't carry it — these are named schema gaps for follow-up issues #48 and #49.

prs.title: CX002 cleanup: extract tests + calibrate module budgets

rule_deltas.mechanism_detail: two halves: (1) test extraction (19 paradigm rules.rs → rules_tests.rs) — would have been resolved_by_code for test-module CX002 hits; (2) CX.default_max_module_lines=700 + 8 module_overrides — would have been suppressed_by_budget_increase + suppressed_by_override for remaining hits

prs.notes: PR #41 bundled a real test-extraction refactor (legitimate, would have been resolved_by_code) with policy calibration (suppressed_by_budget_increase + suppressed_by_override). Not merged. The test-extraction half remains a viable refactor candidate (follow-up issue #3). Any future re-attempt under Policy Guard (#46) would now require PG001/PG002/PG006 debt metadata on the budget+override changes.

prs.title: CX001 cleanup: calibrate per-function budget

rule_deltas.mechanism_detail: pure calibration: CX.default_max_function_lines=120 + 6 per-file overrides — would have been suppressed_by_budget_increase + suppressed_by_override for all 109 hits (109 measured at PR #42 baseline; 106 at pre_36 audit baseline due to source drift)

prs.notes: PR #42 was pure policy calibration with no code changes. 'Zero diagnostics' claim would have meant suppressed_by_budget_increase + suppressed_by_override, not remediation. Not merged. Re-evaluation under Policy Guard (#46) would now fire PG001 (budget raise) + PG002 (new overrides) + PG006 (missing debt metadata on new overrides).
